# Institutional Readiness Plan

This planning note documents future institutional readiness checks only. It is not an executable workflow and does not configure repository permissions.

## Future Concepts

- Documentation integrity review
- Governance continuity review
- Repository governance review
- Contributor governance review
- CI readiness review
- Runtime-disabled assurance review
- Institutional survivability review

## Boundaries

This plan does not enable runtime communication, deployment automation, provider implementation, credential handling, workflow execution, or automatic approval.
